mapper.sql: id, poNo, lineItem, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, stdPrice, purchaseDate, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, receiveWarehouseId, remark, hopeExportDate, inqNo, shikomiAnswerNo, deptNo, deliveryFlag, smcCode, hsCode, customerNo, userNo, locationNo, vipCode, salesInfoNo, purchaseType, supplierPartNo, importFobPriceOriginal, importCurrencyId, operatorId, cnNo, invoiceId, invoiceNo, sendTime, updateTime, status, dealtype, error_msg, finishDate
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_purchaseToctc
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_purchaseToctc (id, poNo, lineItem, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, stdPrice, purchaseDate, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, receiveWarehouseId, remark, hopeExportDate, inqNo, shikomiAnswerNo, deptNo, deliveryFlag, smcCode, hsCode, customerNo, userNo, locationNo, vipCode, salesInfoNo, purchaseType, supplierPartNo, importFobPriceOriginal, importCurrencyId, operatorId, cnNo, invoiceId, invoiceNo, sendTime, updateTime, status, dealtype, error_msg, finishDate) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stdprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{purchasedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{inqno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{operatorid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dealtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{finishdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_purchaseToctc
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdPrice = #{stdprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
purchaseDate = #{purchasedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
hopeDeliveryDate = #{hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE},

receiveWarehouseId = #{receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

hopeExportDate = #{hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE},

purchaseType = #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},

importCurrencyId = #{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
operatorId = #{operatorid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cnNo = #{cnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoiceId = #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
dealtype = #{dealtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
finishDate = #{finishdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
